title: Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd!
